title: Auto Dropper
description: Adds an automated version of Minecraft's Dropper.
body:
![auto-dropper](https://i.imgur.com/FdICcSN.gif)

Simple mod that adds an automated version of Minecraft's Dropper.
The Auto Dropper will drop its items continuously unless it's powered by redstone.
It behaves a bit differently than the default Dropper:

**Dropping Items sideways:**

Removed scattering. Items will always land on the same spot.

**Dropping Items downwards:**

Items will drop straight down instead of being pushed sideways and upwards.

**Dropping Items upwards:**

Items will no longer collide with the Dropper and fly in a random direction. Instead they will spawn right above the Dropper. Using a wooden pressure plate on top is an easy way to automate things since the redstone signal will deactivate the Dropper until the item despawns or is being picked up.

**Modpack Policy:**
- You're allowed to put the mod into any modpack.
- You are not allowed to sell the mod or contents of the mod (like items).
